findings.summary: Degenerate time-Bezier [0,0,1,1] at exact endpoints: FCP returns the opposite root (u(0)=1, u(1)=0); engine returns the natural root. Interior + all strictly-increasing polygons match to ~1e-9.
findings.not_a_bug: Real Motion time-Beziers keep interior handle times strictly increasing; cases.bezierFind tests that faithful domain. Not fitted to the FCP boundary artifact.
